title: patrinia scabiosifolia var. hispida
intro: Patrinia scabiosifolia var. hispida, also known as Hairy Patrinia or Patrinia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Hairy Patrinia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use, and it is also used topically in the form of ointments or poultices for wound care and skin issues.
